# Focana 1.2.1

This release focuses on check-in reliability and compact mode cleanup.

## What's improved

- Fixed several check-in timing issues, including timed detour follow-up handling and races around detour choice and resolution.
- Adjusted the freeflow pulse cadence to reduce collisions between pulse nudges and check-in prompts.
- Simplified compact mode so the active task stays visible, and removed the old compact-task visibility setting.
- Cleaned up stale compact restore-defaults behavior tied to the removed setting.

## macOS

- Continued work on Always on Top behavior for macOS.
- Focana stays above normal windows reliably, but true macOS fullscreen Spaces remain inconsistent and are still under investigation.

## Internal and QA

- Added a local packaged smoke-test license bypass behind `FOCANA_ALLOW_DEV_TEST_LICENSE=1` for local verification only.
- Expanded regression coverage around timing and packaged smoke behavior.
